title: Dakorse Teep
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Dakorse Teep |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'', which include Dakorse Teep's [[Death/Legends|death]] over [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. ''The Essential Reader's Companion'' also dates the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Rogue Seven, all green.|Dakorse Teep|}} '''Dakorse Teep''' was a teenager living during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|retook]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]—a [[Species/Legends|species]] of intergalactic invaders—Teep and Rogue Squadron were stationed in the Republic garrison on the planet. During one of the many attempts by the Yuuzhan Vong to wrest control of Borleias back from the Republic, Teep and the Rogues were ordered to attack one of the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Matalok|cruiser analogs]]. Assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[Flight group/Legends|flight]], Teep lagged behind as the Rogues left the protection of the Republic [[Alderaan Biotics|base's]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], leaving him vulnerable. Teep narrowly avoided the Yuuzhan Vong [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser's]] [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] fire, which went on to hit the base's shields, resulting in a concussion that sent the members of Teep's flight into an out-of-control spin. The other members of the flight regained control of their fighters in time; however, Teep was unable to, and his fighter crashed into the jungle below, exploding in a fireball. ==Biography== ===Stationed on Borleias=== [[File:Corran_Horn_EA.jpg|thumb|300px|Corran Horn, Dakorse Teep's flight leader in Rogue Squadron]] A [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], Dakorse Teep was a teenager during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] with a [[Species/Legends|species]] of intergalactic invaders, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], which began in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. [[27 ABY/Legends|Two years into the war]], Teep served in the Republic's elite [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], flying as [[Rogue Seven/Legends|Rogue Seven]]. High attrition levels during the war forced Rogue Squadron to accept members who lacked experience, allowing Teep and others to gain a place in the renowned squadron, where in better times, they may not have qualified. After the New Republic [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|retook]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] from a Yuuzhan Vong occupation force in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall of Coruscant]] to the invaders, Teep and Rogue Squadron were stationed in the Republic garrison on the planet, under the overall command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. The Yuuzhan Vong had launched a campaign to wrest control of Borleias back from the Republic, and after many skirmishes, Antilles was forced to withdraw his forces until they were concentrated in a tight perimeter around the old [[Alderaan Biotics|Alderaanian Biotics]] facility on the planet, which was slowly being surrounded by Yuuzhan Vong ground troops. ===Yuuzhan Vong raid=== {{Quote|Seven, break to port—|Corran Horn, calling to Dakorse Teep moments before Teep's death|}} When the Yuuzhan Vong launched an aerial raid on the biotics facility, Teep and Rogue Squadron were called into action. The Rogues, now reduced to just nine members, were organized into three [[shield trio]]s—groups of three starfighters that, while flying in close formation, would extend the radius of their [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial compensators]] to provide overlapping coverage of the three-ship formation—with Teep assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] trio along with the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Leth Liav]]. The squadron was to attack one of the Yuuzhan Vong [[Matalok|cruiser analogs]] that were bombarding the Republic base with [[Plasma cannon/Legends|plasma cannons]]. As the Rogues rose to leave the protection of the base's shields, Teep lagged behind, offering his shield-mates no protection from his shields and leaving himself vulnerable. The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] analog the Rogues were meant to be attacking launched a [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] barrage on the biotics facility that angled toward Teep's starfighter. Horn, aware of the danger, ordered Teep to evade, and the main ball of plasma passed Teep harmlessly. However, when the plasma ball hit the facility's shields, the resulting concussion hammered Teep, Horn, and Liav, sending their fighters into spins. Horn regained control of his fighter first, and watched as Teep and Liav rolled as they fell, out of control, toward the jungle below. Liav managed to come out of her roll not far above the treetops; however, Teep could not regain control of his fighter in time, and the teenager's fighter punched through the treetops, exploding in a fireball. Dismayed at the loss of another child to the war, Horn led Liav as they continued the battle against the Yuuzhan Vong. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Close it up, Seven.''"
"''Sorry, Nine. Coming.|Corran Horn and Dakorse Teep|}} An inexperienced pilot, Dakorse Teep was only a teenager when he was given a position in the famed Rogue Squadron due to the high level of attrition during the Yuuzhan Vong War. Corran Horn thought Teep should have been playing with Horn's son, only a few years Teep's junior, rather than flying a starfighter in the war. When the Rogues were ordered to attack a Yuuzhan Vong cruiser analog in defense of the New Republic base, Teep lagged behind as his fellow pilots rose above the base's shields, leaving himself vulnerable and the members of his [[Flight group/Legends|flight]] without protection from his shields. After plasma fire from the Yuuzhan Vong cruiser sent Teep, Liav, and Horn spinning out of control, Teep was the only one unable to regain control of his fighter in time, leading to his [[Death/Legends|death]]. ==Equipment== Serving in Rogue Squadron, Teep flew an X-wing while stationed on Borleias. ==Behind the scenes== Dakorse Teep appeared in [[Aaron Allston]]'s [[2002]] novel, ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Rogue Seven/Legends|Rogue Seven]] |years=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] |before=[[Ligg Panat]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' |before-years=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] |after= |after-years=}} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Teep, Dakorse}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Rogue Squadron personnel]]
